policies.name: Structural hierarchy
policies.description: Always link database → table → column from analyzed metadata.

policies.name: Stitch columns by matching full name
policies.description: Link columns across databases when column names match exactly (case-insensitive).

policies.name: Stitch by logical attribute name
policies.description: Link columns that share the same logical data attribute from semantic mapping.

policies.name: Stitch tables by matching name
policies.description: Link tables across databases when table names match.

policies.name: PII columns to compliance ledger
policies.description: Route confidential / PII columns to the GDPR Compliance Ledger report.

policies.name: Financial columns to revenue dashboard
policies.description: Route payment and revenue-related columns to the Sales & Revenue Dashboard.
